Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Huazhibao Electric Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Huazhibao Electric Co., Ltd. is an extremely classic 'micro weak-current security contractor/agent constrained by commercial physical limitation clauses.' The forensic engine has completely cleared the underlying preset massive Apple Inc. consumer electronics OEM data. The official commercial system directly categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' simply because the very first sentence of its business license is the extremely intimidating 'motor, transformer production.' However, physical probes and legal semantic analysis directly exposed this industrial disguise: this is an old micro-enterprise established in 2006, with a paid-in capital of only 510,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is only '2 people.' Its registered address is 'No. 110 Zhongshan East Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing,' which is the extremely core Xinjiekou-Daxinggong prime commercial location in Nanjing. The most fatal coup de grace comes from the license clause itself: 'motor, transformer production (production is limited to branch offices).' Legally, this sentence directly declares that this headquarters address absolutely does not possess, nor is it allowed to possess, any physical manufacturing capability, and there are no actual operating branch factories under this enterprise's name. Combined with the true business in the latter half: 'sales of electromechanical products, audio equipment, weak-current equipment' and 'weak-current security system engineering construction.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is absolutely not a motor or transformer manufacturing plant. This is a pure 'Two-Person Weak Current & Security Contractor and equipment reselling shell in a prime downtown location.' The boss (Tao Xueying) uses this old shell to take on some security surveillance installation projects, earning the price difference on equipment and construction fees.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
